div1.entryFree: Unbruised, unhurt, undamaged: live u. and love my cousin, Ado V, 4, 112. helmets all u. John II, 254. the fresh and yet u. Greeks, John II, 254. too full of the wars' surfeits, to go rove with one that's yet u. Cor. IV, 1, 47. where u. youth with unstuffed brain doth couch his limbs, there golden sleep doth reign, Rom. II, 3, 37.
